title: Logic, Sets, Counting, and Decision Rules · Model Lens: Set Membership
summary: Audit eligibility rules and resource allocation without double-counting people or contradicting policy. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg set membership increment in a tested eligibility and allocation rule set. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent categories, subsets, unions, intersections, and complements from precise definitions.
Perform sensitivity checks on income, rate, and expense assumptions before recommending a plan.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
